2603.15547.title: Can LLMs Model Incorrect Student Reasoning? A Case Study on Distractor Generation
2603.15547.paper_summary: Modeling plausible student misconceptions is critical for AI in education. In this work, we examine how large language models (LLMs) reason about misconceptions when generating multiple-choice distractors, a task that requires modeling incorrect yet plausible answers by coordinating solution knowledge, simulating student misconceptions, and evaluating plausibility. We introduce a taxonomy for analyzing the strategies used by state-of-the-art LLMs, examining their reasoning procedures and comparing them to established best practices in the learning sciences. Our structured analysis reveals a surprising alignment between their processes and best practices: the models typically solve the problem correctly first, then articulate and simulate multiple potential misconceptions, and finally select a set of distractors. An analysis of failure modes reveals that errors arise primarily from failures in recovering the correct solution and selecting among response candidates, rather than simulating errors or structuring the process. Consistent with these results, we find that providing the correct solution in the prompt improves alignment with human-authored distractors by 8%, highlighting the critical role of anchoring to the correct solution when generating plausible incorrect student reasoning. Overall, our analysis offers a structured and interpretable lens into LLMs' ability to model incorrect student reasoning and produce high-quality distractors.
2603.15547.paper_summary_zh: 建模合理的學生誤解對於教育中的人工智慧至關重要。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們檢視大型語言模型（LLMs）在生成多選擇干擾項時如何推理誤解，這項任務需要通過協調解決方案知識、模擬學生誤解和評估合理性來建模不正確但合理的答案。<lb/>我們引入了一個分類法來分析最先進的LLMs所使用的策略，檢查它們的推理過程並將其與學習科學中的既定最佳實踐進行比較。<lb/>我們的結構化分析揭示了它們的過程與最佳實踐之間的驚人一致性：這些模型通常首先正確解決問題，然後闡述並模擬多種潛在的誤解，最後選擇一組干擾項。<lb/>對失敗模式的分析顯示，錯誤主要來自於恢復正確解決方案和在回應候選者中選擇時的失敗，而不是模擬錯誤或結構化過程。<lb/>與這些結果一致，我們發現，在提示中提供正確解決方案可以將與人類創作的干擾項的對齊度提高8%，突顯了在生成合理的不正確學生推理時，依賴正確解決方案的重要角色。<lb/>總體而言，我們的分析提供了一個結構化且可解釋的視角，深入了解LLMs建模不正確學生推理和生成高質量干擾項的能力。
2603.15547.author: Yanick Zengaffinen et.al.
2603.15547.authors: Yanick Zengaffinen, Andreas Opedal, Donya Rooein, Kv Aditya Srivatsa, Shashank Sonkar, Mrinmaya Sachan
